raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Lack of clear escalation procedure for critical risks", "recommended_fix": "Establish a clear escalation procedure for critical risks and review it with the CEO"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/project_v0laura_vision.md", "issue": "Insufficient monitoring of agent performance and user experience", "recommended_fix": "Implement regular monitoring and evaluation of agent performance and user experience to ensure alignment with the v0Laura vision"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Non-compliance with Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws", "recommended_fix": "Conduct a thorough review of the ecosystem to ensure compliance with all Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Lack of clear escalation procedure for critical risks
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a clear escalation procedure for critical risks and review it with the CEO

findings.issue: Insufficient monitoring of agent performance and user experience
findings.recommended_fix: Implement regular monitoring and evaluation of agent performance and user experience to ensure alignment with the v0Laura vision

findings.issue: Non-compliance with Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct a thorough review of the ecosystem to ensure compliance with all Foundation Laws and Crystal Economy Laws
